name: time-entry-crud
description: Generic time-entry table + CRUD route + week/month calendar views with red-day highlighting + Material-style date and 24h clock pickers + multi-break and task-segment editors. Drizzle + NextAuth.

endpoints: GET    /api/time-entries?startDate&endDate — list entries for the signed-in user
components: TimePicker (Material-style 24h analog clock with text fallback)
TaskSegmentEditor (split a shift into labelled segments)
EditTimeEntryDialog (full edit form wired to the API route)

postInstall: 1. Add `timeEntries` to your lib/db/schema map and push the schema
2. The schema's `projectId` is optional — set it if you have a projects table, leave null otherwise
3. Calendar components accept `redDays` (RedDayInfo[]) — pass `getHolidays(year)` from swedish-tax-holidays if you want red-day highlighting
4. EditTimeEntryDialog defaults to Swedish handels-style overtime options; override via `overtimeOptions` prop
5. The auto-break helper has built-in defaults (4h→15min, 6h→30min, 8h→60min) — pass `BreakRule[]` to override per project
6. Date handling rule: ALWAYS use local date components, never toISOString() (causes UTC shift) — see CLAUDE.md from the source project
